balance.description: Can shapeshift into a powerful Moonkin, balancing the power of Arcane and Nature magic to destroy enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

left.name: Keeper of the Grove
left.description: Keepers of the Grove take inspiration from Cenarius' mighty children to protect the balance of nature and safeguard the Dream. They channel the power of the Dream to strengthen their spells and summon empowered treants to protect their allies and crush their enemies.

right.name: Elune's Chosen
right.description: Elune's Chosen dedicate themselves to the Moon Goddess and are granted her connection to the moon and stars. Their abilities are infused with astral might and they can call down potent lunar magics.

nodes.name: Rake
nodes.description:
Rake the target for 10 Bleed damage and an additional 57 Bleed damage over 15 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Frenzied Regeneration
nodes.description: Heals you for 32% health over 3 sec.

nodes.name: Rejuvenation
nodes.description: Heals the target for 1,672 over 12 sec.

nodes.name: Starfire
nodes.description:
Call down a burst of energy, causing 389 Arcane damage to the target, and 268 Arcane damage to all other enemies within 10 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Generates 8 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Grievous Wounds
nodes.description: Rake, Rip, and Thrash damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Swipe
nodes.description: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

nodes.name: Ursoc's Spirit
nodes.description:
Stamina increased by 4%.

Stamina in Bear Form is increased by an additional 5%.

nodes.name: Wild Growth
nodes.description: Heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 1,085 over 7 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

nodes.name: Starsurge
nodes.description: Launch a surge of stellar energies at the target, dealing 1,280 Astral damage.

nodes.name: Rip
nodes.description:
Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over time. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : 8 over 1 sec
   2 points: 12 over 2 sec
   3 points: 16 over 3 sec
   4 points: 20 over 3 sec
   5 points: 24 over 4 sec

nodes.name: Verdant Heart
nodes.description: Frenzied Regeneration and Barkskin increase all healing received by 20%.

nodes.name: Remove Corruption
nodes.description: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

nodes.name: Moonkin Form
nodes.description:
Shapeshift into Moonkin Form, increasing the damage of your spells by 10% and your armor by 125%, and granting protection from Polymorph effects.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

nodes.name: Maim
nodes.description:
Finishing move that causes Physical damage and stuns the target. Damage and duration increased per combo point:

   1 point  : 5 damage, 1 sec
   2 points: 10 damage, 2 sec
   3 points: 15 damage, 3 sec
   4 points: 20 damage, 4 sec
   5 points: 25 damage, 5 sec

nodes.name: Killer Instinct
nodes.description: Physical damage and Armor increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Ironfur
nodes.description: Increases armor by 124 for 7 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Barkskin
nodes.description: Barkskin's duration is increased by 4 sec.

nodes.name: Hibernate
nodes.description: Forces the enemy target to sleep for up to 40 sec. Any damage will awaken the target. Only one target can be forced to hibernate at a time. Only works on Beasts and Dragonkin.

nodes.name: Nurturing Instinct
nodes.description: Magical damage and healing increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Sunfire
nodes.description: A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for 82 Nature damage and then an additional 705 Nature damage over 18 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Fury
nodes.description:
While in Cat Form, when you critically strike with an attack that generates a combo point, you gain an additional combo point. Damage over time cannot trigger this effect.

Mangle critical strike damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Thick Hide
nodes.description: Reduces all damage taken by 4%.

nodes.name: Light of the Sun
nodes.description: Reduces the remaining cooldown on Solar Beam by 15 sec when it interrupts the primary target.

nodes.name: Natural Recovery
nodes.description: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

nodes.name: Astral Influence
nodes.description: Increases the range of all of your spells by 5 yards.

choices.name: Wild Charge
choices.description: Fly to a nearby ally's position.

choices.name: Tiger Dash
choices.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

choices.name: Soothe
choices.description: Soothes the target, dispelling all enrage effects.

choices.name: Cyclone
choices.description: Tosses the enemy target into the air, disorienting them but making them invulnerable for up to 5 sec. Only one target can be affected by your Cyclone at a time.

nodes.name: Aessina's Renewal
nodes.description:
When a hit deals more than 12% of your maximum health, instantly heal for 10% of your health.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Starlight Conduit
nodes.description:
Wrath, Starsurge, and Starfire damage increased by 5%. 

Starsurge's cooldown is reduced by 4 sec and its mana cost is reduced by 50%.

nodes.name: Feline Swiftness
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 15%.

nodes.name: Well-Honed Instincts
nodes.description: When you fall below 40% health, you cast Frenzied Regeneration, up to once every 120 sec.

nodes.name: Matted Fur
nodes.description: When you use Barkskin or Survival Instincts, absorb 525 damage for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Stampeding Roar
nodes.description: Shift into Bear Form and let loose a wild roar, increasing the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 60% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Lingering Healing
nodes.description:
Rejuvenation's duration is increased by 3 sec.

Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec when cast on yourself.

nodes.name: Typhoon
nodes.description: Blasts targets within 15 yards in front of you with a violent Typhoon, knocking them back and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

choices.name: Mass Entanglement
choices.description: Roots the target and all enemies within 12 yards in place for 10 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

choices.name: Ursol's Vortex
choices.description: Conjures a vortex of wind for 10 sec at the destination, reducing the movement speed of all enemies within 8 yards by 50%. The first time an enemy attempts to leave the vortex, winds will pull that enemy back to its center. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

nodes.name: Oakskin
nodes.description: Survival Instincts and Barkskin reduce damage taken by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Perfectly-Honed Instincts
nodes.description: Well-Honed Instincts can trigger up to once every 90 sec.

nodes.name: Instincts of the Claw
nodes.description: Ferocious Bite and Maul damage increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Lycara's Teachings
nodes.description:
You gain 3% of a stat while in each form:

No Form: Haste
Cat Form: Critical Strike
Bear Form: Versatility
Moonkin Form: Mastery

nodes.name: Lore of the Grove
nodes.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: Gale Winds
choices.description: Increases Typhoon's radius by 20% and its range by 5 yds.

choices.name: Incessant Tempest
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Typhoon by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Gift of the Wild
nodes.description: Mark of the Wild is 100% more effective on yourself.

choices.name: Incapacitating Roar
choices.description: Shift into Bear Form and invoke the spirit of Ursol to let loose a deafening roar, incapacitating all enemies within 10 yards for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Mighty Bash
choices.description: Invokes the spirit of Ursoc to stun the target for 4 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

nodes.name: Ursine Vigor
nodes.description: For 4 sec after shifting into Bear Form, your health and armor are increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Improved Stampeding Roar
nodes.description: Cooldown reduced by 60 sec.

choices.name: Circle of the Wild
choices.description: Physical damage dealt by your abilities increased by 5%.

choices.name: Circle of the Heavens
choices.description: Magical damage dealt by your spells increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Lycara's Inspiration
nodes.description:
You gain a bonus while in each form inspired by the breadth of your Druidic knowledge:

No Form: 4% Magic Damage
Cat Form: 4% Stamina
Bear Form: 5% Movement Speed
Moonkin Form: 3% Area damage taken reduction

nodes.name: Symbiotic Relationship
nodes.description: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

nodes.name: Forestwalk
nodes.description: Casting Regrowth increases your movement speed and healing received by 8% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Fluid Form
nodes.description:
Shred, Rake, and Skull Bash can be used in any form and shift you into Cat Form, if necessary. 

Mangle can be used in any form and shifts you into Bear Form. 

Wrath and Starfire shift you into Moonkin Form, if known.

nodes.name: Heart of the Wild
nodes.description:
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 6,514 over 7 sec.

Bear Form:
Increase your maximum health by 30% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Innervate
nodes.description: Infuse a friendly healer with energy, allowing them to cast spells without spending mana for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Eclipse
nodes.description:
You may draw the sun and moon into alignment for 15 sec, empowering either your Nature or Arcane spells. Casting Wrath or Starfire changes what mode of Eclipse will be entered, and the two modes of Eclipse share a button and 32 sec cooldown.

 Eclipse (Solar)
Nature spells deal 15% additional damage and Wrath damage is increased by 40%.

 Eclipse (Lunar)
Arcane spells deal 15% additional damage and Starfire damage is increased by 40%.

nodes.name: Shooting Stars
nodes.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage over time has a chance to call down a falling star, dealing 263 Astral damage and generating 2 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Solar Beam
nodes.description: Summons a beam of solar light over an enemy target's location, interrupting the target and silencing all enemies within the beam. Lasts 8 sec.

nodes.name: Solstice
nodes.description: During the first 6 sec of every Eclipse, Shooting Stars fall 200% more often.

nodes.name: Force of Nature
nodes.description:
Summons a stand of 3 Treants for 10 sec which immediately taunt and attack enemies in the targeted area.

Generates 20 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Twin Moons
nodes.description: Moonfire deals 10% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

nodes.name: Improved Eclipse
nodes.description: Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse have one additional charge.

nodes.name: Nature's Balance
nodes.description:
While in combat you generate 1 Astral Power every 2 sec.

While out of combat your Astral Power rebalances to 50 instead of depleting to empty.

nodes.name: Umbral Intensity
nodes.description:
Solar Eclipse increases Wrath damage by an additional 10%. 

Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire damage by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Aetherial Kindling
choices.description: Casting Starfall extends the duration of active Moonfires and Sunfires by 3.0 sec, up to 28 sec.

choices.name: Meteor Storm
choices.description: Starfall deals its damage 100% faster.

nodes.name: Wild Surges
nodes.description: Your Wrath and Starfire chance to critically strike is increased by 10% and they generate 2 additional Astral Power.

nodes.name: Celestial Alignment
nodes.description: Celestial bodies align, maintaining both Eclipses and granting 10% haste for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Soul of the Forest
nodes.description: Solar Eclipse increases Wrath's Astral Power generation by 40% and Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire's Astral Power generation by 40%.

choices.name: Sunseeker Mushroom
choices.description:
Sunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing 1,010 Nature damage and then an additional 570 Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

choices.name: Wild Mushroom
choices.description:
Grow a magical mushroom at the target enemy's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing 1,211 Nature damage and then an additional 684 Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

choices.name: Nature's Grace
choices.description: When Eclipse ends or when you enter combat, enter a Dreamstate, reducing the cast time of your next 2 Starfires or Wraths by 30%.

choices.name: Elune's Challenge
choices.description: When you exit Eclipse with less than 40 Astral Power, Wrath and Starfire's cast times are reduced by 20% for 15 sec or until you enter an Eclipse.

nodes.name: Stellar Amplification
nodes.description: Starsurge increases the damage the target takes from your periodic effects and Shooting Stars by 16% for 5 sec. Reapplying this effect extends its duration, up to 20 sec.

choices.name: Whirling Stars
choices.description: Celestial Alignment's cooldown is reduced by 60 seconds and it has two charges.

choices.name: Orbital Strike
choices.description:
Celestial Alignment blasts all enemies in a targeted area for 1,019 Astral damage and applies Stellar Flare to them.

Reduces the cooldown of Celestial Alignment by 60 sec.

 Stellar Flare
Burns the target for 67 Astral damage, and then an additional 894 damage over 24 sec. If dispelled, causes 803 damage to the dispeller and blasts them upwards.

Generates 12 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Touch the Cosmos
nodes.description:
Casting Wrath has a 15% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

Casting Starfire has a 20% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

nodes.name: Meteorites
nodes.description: Every time Starfall drops a wave of stars, a meteorite also falls on up to 2 targets in its range, each dealing 87 Astral damage.

nodes.name: Cosmic Rapidity
nodes.description: Your Moonfire and Sunfire deal damage 13% more frequently, also increasing the rate that Shooting Stars fall.

nodes.name: Celestial Fire
nodes.description: Moonfire, Sunfire, and Shooting Stars damage increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Astral Communion
nodes.description: Increases maximum Astral Power by 20. Entering Eclipse reduces the Astral Power cost of your next Starsurge or Starfall by 15.

nodes.name: Hail of Stars
nodes.description: Casting a free Starsurge or Starfall grants Solstice for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Starlord
nodes.description:
Starsurge and Starfall grant you 2% Haste for 20 sec or until you enter a new Eclipse.

Stacks up to 3 times. Gaining a stack does not refresh the duration.

nodes.name: Sculpt the Stars
nodes.description: The cooldowns of Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse are reduced by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Balance of All Things
nodes.description: Entering Eclipse increases your critical strike chance with Arcane or Nature spells by 10%, decreasing by 1% every 1 sec.

nodes.name: Total Eclipse
nodes.description: Entering any Eclipse has a 10% chance to grant the benefits of both Lunar and Solar Eclipse.

choices.name: Starweaver
choices.description: Starsurge has a 20% chance to make Starfall free. Starfall has a 40% chance to make Starsurge free.

choices.name: Rattle the Stars
choices.description: Starsurge and Starfall deal 8% increased damage and their cost is reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Power of Goldrinn
nodes.description: Starsurge has a chance to summon the Spirit of Goldrinn, which immediately deals 974 Astral damage to the target.

choices.name: Sundered Firmament
choices.description: Every other Eclipse creates a Fury of Elune at 25% effectiveness that follows your current target for 8 sec.

choices.name: Orbit Breaker
choices.description: Every 30th Shooting Star calls down a Full Moon at 60% effectiveness upon its target.

choices.name: Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
choices.description:
An improved Moonkin Form that grants both Eclipses, any learned Celestial Alignment bonuses, and 10% critical strike chance.

Lasts 20 sec. You may shapeshift in and out of this improved Moonkin Form for its duration.

choices.name: Convoke the Spirits
choices.description:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec.

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

choices.name: Fury of Elune
choices.description:
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy that follows the enemy, dealing up to 1,105 Astral damage over 8 sec within its area. Damage reduced on secondary targets.

Generates 40 Astral Power over its duration.

choices.name: New Moon
choices.description:
Deals 976 Astral damage to the target and empowers New Moon to become Half Moon. 

Generates 10 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Umbral Embrace
nodes.description: Wrath and Starfire have a 20% chance to cause your next Wrath or Starfire cast during an Eclipse to become Astral and deal 75% additional damage.

nodes.name: Harmony of the Heavens
nodes.description: Starsurge or Starfall increase your current Eclipse's Arcane or Nature damage bonus by an additional 2%, up to 6%.

nodes.name: Elune's Guidance
nodes.description:
Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
Reduces the Astral Power cost of Starsurge by 10, and the Astral Power cost of Starfall by 12.

 Convoke the Spirits
Cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

nodes.name: Denizen of the Dream
nodes.description: Your Moonfire and Sunfire have a chance to summon a Faerie Dragon to assist you in battle for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Radiant Moonlight
nodes.description:
New Moon, Half Moon, and Full Moon deal 25% increased damage. Full Moon becomes Full Moon once more before resetting to New Moon.

Fury of Elune deals 50% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

ranks.description: Activating an Eclipse makes your next Wrath or Starfire instant. The first 3 Starsurges or Starfalls you cast during each Eclipse deal 20% increased damage.
Your critical strikes dealt during an Eclipse cause their victims to languish for an additional 12% of damage dealt for 6 sec.

Activating an Eclipse also launches Solar or Lunar Bolts at enemies within 40 yds that always critically strike.

 Solar Bolt
Entering Solar Eclipse launches a Solar Bolt at 1 enemy that deals 1,900 Nature damage.

 Lunar Bolt
Entering Lunar Eclipse launches 3 Lunar Bolts at enemies that deal 344 Arcane damage to them and nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

choices.name: Bounteous Bloom
choices.description: Your Grove Guardians' healing is increased by 30%.

choices.name: Early Spring
choices.description: Swiftmend and Wild Growth cooldowns reduced by 1 sec.

choices.name: Power of the Dream
choices.description: Dream Surge heals 1 additional ally.

choices.name: Control of the Dream
choices.description:
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to 15 seconds.

Affects Force of Nature, Celestial Alignment, and Convoke the Spirits.

nodes.name: Protective Growth
nodes.description: Your Regrowth protects you, reducing damage you take by 8% while your Regrowth is on you.

choices.name: Grove's Inspiration
choices.description:
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by 10%. 

Regrowth, Wild Growth, and Swiftmend healing increased by 9%.

choices.name: Potent Enchantments
choices.description:
Orbital Strike damage increased by 30%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by 30%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during Celestial Alignment by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Treants of the Moon
nodes.description: Your Grove Guardians cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

nodes.name: Dream Surge
nodes.description: When Grove Guardians are summoned, they grow Dream Petals on your target, healing up to 3 nearby allies for 545.

nodes.name: Blooming Infusion
nodes.description:
Every 5 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by 100%.

Every 5 Starsurges you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

nodes.name: Expansiveness
nodes.description: Your maximum mana is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Cenarius' Might
nodes.description: Swiftmend healing is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Power of Nature
choices.description: Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by 10% while active.

choices.name: Durability of Nature
choices.description: Your Force of Nature treants have 100% increased health.

nodes.name: Harmony of the Grove
nodes.description: Each of your Grove Guardians increases your healing done by 5% while active.

nodes.name: Spirit of the Thicket
nodes.description: Your Starfall damage is increased by 12% and your Starsurge damage is increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Dryad's Dance
nodes.description: Dryads cause most of your Astral power generation to be increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Sylvan Beckoning
nodes.description: Entering an Eclipse summons a Dryad to assist you for 8 sec, casting Starsurge dealing 572 Astral damage and Starfall at 200% effectiveness.

choices.name: The Light of Elune
choices.description:
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for 3 sec.

 Fury of Elune
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing 414 Astral damage over 3 sec within its area.

Generates 15 Astral Power over its duration.

choices.name: Astral Insight
choices.description:
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by 10% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by 25%.

choices.name: Arcane Affinity
choices.description: All Arcane damage from your spells and abilities is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Lunation
choices.description: Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Lunar Beam by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: The Eternal Moon
nodes.description:
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

 Fury of Elune
The flash of energy now generates 6 Astral Power and its damage is increased by 50%.

 Full Moon
New Moon and Half Moon now also call down 1 Minor Moon.

nodes.name: Lunar Insight
nodes.description: Moonfire deals 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Lunar Calling
nodes.description: Thrash now deals Arcane damage and its damage is increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Glistening Fur
nodes.description: Bear Form and Moonkin Form reduce Arcane damage taken by 6% and all other magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Stellar Command
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Lunar Beam by 30% and Fury of Elune by 15%.

choices.name: Moondust
choices.description: Enemies affected by Moonfire are slowed by 20%.

choices.name: Elune's Grace
choices.description: Using Wild Charge while in Bear Form or Moonkin Form incurs a 3 sec shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Moon Guardian
nodes.description: Free automatic Moonfires from Galactic Guardian generate 5 Rage.

nodes.name: Atmospheric Exposure
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by Lunar Beam or Fury of Elune take 6% increased damage from you for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Boundless Moonlight
nodes.description:
Fury of Elune
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for 822 Astral damage.

 Full Moon
Full Moon calls down 2 Minor Moons that deal 713 Astral damage and generate 3 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Bask in Moonlight
nodes.description:
Starsurge damage increased by 10%. 
Starfall damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Penumbral Swell
nodes.description: Lunar Eclipse increases Arcane damage by an additional 3%.

nodes.name: Star Cascade
nodes.description: Gaining Astral Power with Wrath or Starfire has a 40% chance to launch a Starsurge at a victim at 70% effectiveness.

feral.description: Takes on the form of a great cat to deal damage with bleeds and bites. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

left.name: Druid of the Claw
left.description: Druids of the Claw are masters of their mighty animal forms. When they transform into cats or bears, they become ferocious combatants and protectors of the wild.

right.name: Wildstalker
right.description: Wildstalkers live amongst the remote wilds, hunting to perpetuate the cycle of life and death and destroy those who would despoil nature and using their healing powers to restore life to barren spaces.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Heart of the Wild
nodes.description:
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 6,514 over 7 sec.

Bear Form:
Increase your maximum health by 30% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Innervate
nodes.description: Infuse a friendly healer with energy, allowing them to cast spells without spending mana for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Maul
nodes.description: Maul the target for 75 Physical damage.

nodes.name: Gore
nodes.description: Thrash, Swipe, Moonfire, and Maul have a 15% chance to reset the cooldown on Mangle, and to cause it to generate an additional 4 Rage.

nodes.name: Survival Instincts
nodes.description: Reduces all damage you take by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Front of the Pack
nodes.description:
Stampeding Roar's radius is increased by 30%.

Your movement speed is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Persistence
nodes.description: When you shapeshift out of Bear Form, its benefits to health and armor slowly decay over 8 sec.

choices.name: Dream of Cenarius
choices.description: When you take non-periodic damage, you have a chance to cause your next Regrowth to heal for an additional 130%, and to be instant, free, and castable in all forms for 30 sec.

choices.name: Dream Guide
choices.description:
When you take non-periodic damage, you have a chance to gain a charge of Dream Guide. 

When you or a nearby ally drops below 40% health, you consume a charge of Dream Guide to automatically cast Regrowth on them. This Regrowth heals for an additional 100%.

nodes.name: Infected Wounds
nodes.description: Mangle and Maul cause an Infected Wound in the target, reducing their movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Innate Resolve
nodes.description:
Frenzied Regeneration's healing is increased by up to 80% based on your missing health.

Frenzied Regeneration has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Berserk
nodes.description: Go berserk for 15 sec, reducing the cooldowns of Mangle, Thrash, and Growl by 50% and the cooldown of Frenzied Regeneration by 100%.

nodes.name: Vulnerable Flesh
nodes.description: Maul and Raze deal 30% increased damage.

nodes.name: Survival of the Fittest
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Barkskin and Survival Instincts by 12%.

nodes.name: Reinvigoration
nodes.description: Frenzied Regeneration heals over 1.0 additional sec and casts Rejuvenation and Regrowth on you at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: After the Wildfire
nodes.description: Every 300 Rage you spend causes a burst of restorative energy, healing up to 5 allies within 20 yds for 210.

nodes.name: Memory of Ysera
nodes.description: Heal each time you spend Rage, up to 0.8% of your maximum health for 80 Rage spent.

nodes.name: Scintillating Moonlight
nodes.description: Moonfire reduces damage dealt to you by 6%.

choices.name: Ward of the Forest
choices.description: Barkskin increases your maximum health by 20%, but its duration is reduced by 40%.

choices.name: Brambles
choices.description:
Sharp brambles protect you, absorbing and reflecting up to 7 damage from each attack.

While Barkskin is active, the brambles also deal 2 Nature damage to all nearby enemies every 1 sec.

nodes.name: Soul of the Forest
nodes.description: Mangle generates 5 more Rage and deals 25% more damage.

nodes.name: Natural Resilience
nodes.description: When Frenzied Regeneration would heal you above maximum health, 80% of its excess healing is instead converted to an absorb shield.

choices.name: Reinforced Fur
choices.description: Ironfur increases armor by an additional 15% and Barkskin reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Bristling Fur
choices.description: Bristle your fur, causing you to generate Rage based on damage taken for 8 sec.

choices.name: Gift of an Ancient Guardian
choices.description: Ironfur increases your Mastery by 5%.

choices.name: Guardian of Elune
choices.description: Mangle increases the duration of your next Ironfur by 3 sec, or the healing of your next Frenzied Regeneration by 20%.

choices.name: Ursoc's Endurance
choices.description: Increases the duration of Barkskin and Ironfur by 2.0 sec.

choices.name: Gory Fur
choices.description: Mangle has a 15% chance to reduce the Rage cost of your next Ironfur by 25%.

nodes.name: Ursol's Warding
nodes.description: Gain magical damage reduction equal to 10% of your damage reduction from armor.

choices.name: Rend and Tear
choices.description: Each stack of Thrash reduces the target's damage to you by 3% and increases your damage to them by 2%.

choices.name: Untamed Savagery
choices.description: Increases the damage and radius of Thrash by 25%.

nodes.name: Raze
nodes.description: Strike with the might of Ursoc, dealing 74 Physical damage to your target and 40 to all other enemies in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Lunar Beam
nodes.description:
Summons a beam of lunar light at your target's location, dealing 13 Arcane damage each second to your target and 14 to up to 5 other enemies within the beam. 

Lunar Beam also increases your mastery by 18%, and heals you for 772 over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Ursoc's Fury
nodes.description: Thrash and Maul grant you an absorb shield for 30% of the damage dealt for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Flashing Claws
nodes.description:
Thrash has a 10% chance to trigger an additional Thrash.

Thrash stacks 1 additional time.

nodes.name: Blood Frenzy
nodes.description: Thrash also generates 3 Rage each time it deals damage, on up to 5 targets.

nodes.name: Moonless Night
nodes.description: Your direct damage melee abilities against enemies afflicted by Moonfire cause them to burn for an additional 20% Arcane damage.

nodes.name: Fury of Nature
nodes.description: While in Bear Form, you deal 15% increased Arcane damage.

choices.name: Twin Moonfire
choices.description: Moonfire deals 8% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

choices.name: Red Moon
choices.description: Channel the power of the enraged moon to deal 2,432 Arcane damage to your target over 8 sec. Casting Mangle extends its duration by 1.0 sec and generates 8 Rage.

nodes.name: Harnessed Rage
nodes.description: Mangle has 1 additional charge and when Maul is cast at 80 Rage or above its chance to activate Gore is increased by 100%.

choices.name: Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc
choices.description:
An improved Bear Form that grants the benefits of Berserk, causes Mangle to hit up to 3 targets, and increases maximum health by 30%.

Lasts 30 sec. You may freely shapeshift in and out of this improved Bear Form for its duration.

choices.name: Convoke the Spirits
choices.description:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec.

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

nodes.name: Elune's Favored
nodes.description: While in Bear Form, you are healed for 15% of all Arcane damage done.

nodes.name: Killing Blow
nodes.description: Maul and Raze may consume up to 20 more Rage to deal up to 70% additional damage.

nodes.name: Sundering Roar
nodes.description:
Roar with earthshattering ferocity, dealing 97 Physical damage, and resetting the cooldown of Thrash and allowing it to stack 5 additional times for 12 sec. 

When Sundering Roar ends, any excess stacks of Thrash immediately deal their remaining damage.

nodes.name: Ursoc's Guidance
nodes.description:
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc: 
Every 25 Rage you spend reduces the cooldown of Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc by 1 sec.

 Convoke the Spirits: 
Convoke the Spirits' cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

nodes.name: Waking Nightmare
nodes.description:
Awaken memories of past conflicts, causing a Dread Shade to take form nearby.

While active, shades slowly travel toward your target, dealing 24 Nature damage to nearby enemies and mirroring your Thrash casts.

nodes.name: Galactic Guardian
nodes.description:
Your damage has a 5% chance to trigger a free automatic Moonfire on that target.

 Moonfire:
When this occurs, the next Moonfire you cast generates 8 Rage, and deals 300% increased direct damage.

 Red Moon:
When this occurs, you gain 1 charge of Lunar Wrath. Each 20 Rage you spend while Red Moon is active consumes a stack to deal 380 additional Arcane damage to its target and heal you for 494.

ranks.description:
After you cast Berserk or Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc, you gain access to Wild Guardian:
 Wild Guardian:
Spirits of the wild come to your aid, causing your next 2 casts of Ironfur, Maul, and Frenzied Regeneration to be echoed at 50% effectiveness.

Mastery increased by 3%. 

When you cast Wild Guardian, you gain 1 charges of Dream Guide.

Wild Guardian's echoes are now cast at 200% effectiveness, and each echo 2 additional times over 8.0 sec.

Maul is always empowered and deals 40% additional Nature damage over 12 sec.

nodes.name: Ravage
nodes.description:
Your auto-attacks have a chance to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

Ravage
Finishing move that slashes through your target in a wide arc, dealing Physical damage per combo point to your target and consuming up to 25 additional Energy to increase that damage by up to 100%. Hits all other enemies in front of you for reduced damage per combo point spent. 

1 point: 13 damage, 6 in an arc
2 points: 26 damage, 12 in an arc
3 points: 40 damage, 18 in an arc
4 points: 53 damage, 23 in an arc
5 points: 66 damage, 30 in an arc

nodes.name: Wildshape Mastery
nodes.description:
Ironfur and Frenzied Regeneration persist in Cat Form.

When transforming from Bear to Cat Form, you retain 80% of your Bear Form armor and health for 6 sec.

For 6 sec after entering Bear Form, you heal for 10% of damage taken over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Bestial Strength
nodes.description: Maul and Raze damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: Empowered Shapeshifting
choices.description:
Frenzied Regeneration can be cast in Cat Form for 40 Energy.

Bear Form reduces magic damage you take by 6%.

Shred and Swipe damage increased by 10%. Mangle damage increased by 25%.

choices.name: Wildpower Surge
choices.description: Mangle grants Feline Potential. When you have 6 stacks, the next time you transform into Cat Form, gain 5 combo points and your next Ferocious Bite or Rip deals 50% increased damage for its full duration.

nodes.name: Claw Rampage
nodes.description: During Berserk, Shred, and Swipe have a 20% chance to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

choices.name: Strike for the Heart
choices.description: Mangle damage increased by 10% and its critical strike chance is increased by 10%.

choices.name: Tear Down the Mighty
choices.description: The cooldown of Sundering Roar is reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Pack's Endurance
nodes.description: Stampeding Roar's duration is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Aggravate Wounds
nodes.description: Every attack with an Energy cost that you cast extends the duration of your Dreadful Wounds by 0.6 sec, up to 8 additional sec.

nodes.name: Fount of Strength
nodes.description:
Your maximum Energy and Rage are increased by 20.

Frenzied Regeneration also increases your maximum health by 10%.

nodes.name: Exacerbating Wounds
nodes.description: Your Dreadful Wounds increase the damage afflicted enemies take from your Bleed damage over time effects by 15%.

nodes.name: Dreadful Wound
nodes.description:
Ravage also inflicts a Bleed that causes 35 damage over 6 sec and saps its victims' strength, reducing damage they deal to you by 15%.

Dreadful Wound is not affected by Circle of Life and Death.

nodes.name: Twin Claw
nodes.description: You have a 18% chance to follow up any single target melee ability with a Twin Claw, dealing 120 Physical damage and generating 5 Rage.

nodes.name: Limb from Limb
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks are 30% more likely to make your next Maul become Ravage.

choices.name: Ruthless Aggression
choices.description: Ravage increases your auto-attack speed by 35% for 6 sec.

choices.name: Killing Strikes
choices.description:
Ravage increases your Agility by 8% and the armor granted by Ironfur by 20% for 8 sec.

Your first Mangle after entering combat makes your next Maul become Ravage.

choices.name: The Light of Elune
choices.description:
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for 3 sec.

 Fury of Elune
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing 413 Astral damage over 3 sec within its area.

Generates 15 Astral Power over its duration.

choices.name: Astral Insight
choices.description:
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by 10% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by 25%.

choices.name: Arcane Affinity
choices.description: All Arcane damage from your spells and abilities is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Lunation
choices.description: Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Lunar Beam by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: The Eternal Moon
nodes.description:
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

 Fury of Elune
The flash of energy now generates 6 Astral Power and its damage is increased by 50%.

 Full Moon
New Moon and Half Moon now also call down 1 Minor Moon.

nodes.name: Lunar Insight
nodes.description: Moonfire deals 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Lunar Calling
nodes.description: Thrash now deals Arcane damage and its damage is increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Glistening Fur
nodes.description: Bear Form and Moonkin Form reduce Arcane damage taken by 6% and all other magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Stellar Command
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Lunar Beam by 30% and Fury of Elune by 15%.

choices.name: Moondust
choices.description: Enemies affected by Moonfire are slowed by 20%.

choices.name: Elune's Grace
choices.description: Using Wild Charge while in Bear Form or Moonkin Form incurs a 3 sec shorter cooldown.

nodes.name: Moon Guardian
nodes.description: Free automatic Moonfires from Galactic Guardian generate 5 Rage.

nodes.name: Atmospheric Exposure
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by Lunar Beam or Fury of Elune take 6% increased damage from you for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Boundless Moonlight
nodes.description:
Fury of Elune
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for 822 Astral damage.

 Full Moon
Full Moon calls down 2 Minor Moons that deal 711 Astral damage and generate 3 Astral Power.

nodes.name: Bask in Moonlight
nodes.description:
Starsurge damage increased by 10%. 
Starfall damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Penumbral Swell
nodes.description: Lunar Eclipse increases Arcane damage by an additional 3%.

nodes.name: Star Cascade
nodes.description: Gaining Astral Power with Wrath or Starfire has a 40% chance to launch a Starsurge at a victim at 70% effectiveness.

restoration.description: Channels powerful Nature magic to regenerate and revitalize allies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

left.name: Wildstalker
left.description: Wildstalkers live amongst the remote wilds, hunting to perpetuate the cycle of life and death and destroy those who would despoil nature and using their healing powers to restore life to barren spaces.

right.name: Keeper of the Grove
right.description: Keepers of the Grove take inspiration from Cenarius' mighty children to protect the balance of nature and safeguard the Dream. They channel the power of the Dream to strengthen their spells and summon empowered treants to protect their allies and crush their enemies.

nodes.name: Rake
nodes.description:
Rake the target for 10 Bleed damage and an additional 57 Bleed damage over 15 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Frenzied Regeneration
nodes.description: Heals you for 32% health over 3 sec.

nodes.name: Rejuvenation
nodes.description: Heals the target for 1,672 over 12 sec.

nodes.name: Starfire
nodes.description: Call down a burst of energy, causing 359 Arcane damage to the target, and 125 Arcane damage to all other enemies within 5 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Grievous Wounds
nodes.description: Rake, Rip, and Thrash damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Swipe
nodes.description: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

nodes.name: Ursoc's Spirit
nodes.description:
Stamina increased by 4%.

Stamina in Bear Form is increased by an additional 5%.

nodes.name: Wild Growth
nodes.description: Heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 1,085 over 7 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

nodes.name: Starsurge
nodes.description: Launch a surge of stellar energies at the target, dealing 803 Astral damage.

nodes.name: Rip
nodes.description:
Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over time. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : 8 over 1 sec
   2 points: 12 over 2 sec
   3 points: 16 over 3 sec
   4 points: 20 over 3 sec
   5 points: 24 over 4 sec

nodes.name: Verdant Heart
nodes.description: Frenzied Regeneration and Barkskin increase all healing received by 20%.

nodes.name: Improved Nature's Cure
nodes.description: Nature's Cure additionally removes all Curse and Poison effects.

nodes.name: Moonkin Form
nodes.description:
Shapeshift into Moonkin Form, increasing the damage of your spells by 10% and your armor by 125%, and granting protection from Polymorph effects.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

nodes.name: Maim
nodes.description:
Finishing move that causes Physical damage and stuns the target. Damage and duration increased per combo point:

   1 point  : 5 damage, 1 sec
   2 points: 10 damage, 2 sec
   3 points: 15 damage, 3 sec
   4 points: 20 damage, 4 sec
   5 points: 25 damage, 5 sec

nodes.name: Killer Instinct
nodes.description: Physical damage and Armor increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Ironfur
nodes.description: Increases armor by 124 for 7 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Barkskin
nodes.description: Barkskin's duration is increased by 4 sec.

nodes.name: Hibernate
nodes.description: Forces the enemy target to sleep for up to 40 sec. Any damage will awaken the target. Only one target can be forced to hibernate at a time. Only works on Beasts and Dragonkin.

nodes.name: Nurturing Instinct
nodes.description: Magical damage and healing increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Sunfire
nodes.description: A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for 81 Nature damage and then an additional 705 Nature damage over 18 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Fury
nodes.description:
While in Cat Form, when you critically strike with an attack that generates a combo point, you gain an additional combo point. Damage over time cannot trigger this effect.

Mangle critical strike damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Thick Hide
nodes.description: Reduces all damage taken by 4%.

nodes.name: Natural Recovery
nodes.description: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

nodes.name: Astral Influence
nodes.description: Increases the range of all of your spells by 5 yards.

choices.name: Wild Charge
choices.description: Fly to a nearby ally's position.

choices.name: Tiger Dash
choices.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

choices.name: Soothe
choices.description: Soothes the target, dispelling all enrage effects.

choices.name: Cyclone
choices.description: Tosses the enemy target into the air, disorienting them but making them invulnerable for up to 5 sec. Only one target can be affected by your Cyclone at a time.

nodes.name: Aessina's Renewal
nodes.description:
When a hit deals more than 12% of your maximum health, instantly heal for 10% of your health.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Starlight Conduit
nodes.description:
Wrath, Starsurge, and Starfire damage increased by 5%. 

Starsurge's cooldown is reduced by 4 sec and its mana cost is reduced by 50%.

nodes.name: Feline Swiftness
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 15%.

nodes.name: Well-Honed Instincts
nodes.description: When you fall below 40% health, you cast Frenzied Regeneration, up to once every 120 sec.

nodes.name: Matted Fur
nodes.description: When you use Barkskin or Survival Instincts, absorb 525 damage for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Stampeding Roar
nodes.description: Shift into Bear Form and let loose a wild roar, increasing the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 60% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Lingering Healing
nodes.description:
Rejuvenation's duration is increased by 3 sec.

Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec when cast on yourself.

nodes.name: Typhoon
nodes.description: Blasts targets within 15 yards in front of you with a violent Typhoon, knocking them back and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

choices.name: Mass Entanglement
choices.description: Roots the target and all enemies within 12 yards in place for 10 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

choices.name: Ursol's Vortex
choices.description: Conjures a vortex of wind for 10 sec at the destination, reducing the movement speed of all enemies within 8 yards by 50%. The first time an enemy attempts to leave the vortex, winds will pull that enemy back to its center. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

nodes.name: Oakskin
nodes.description: Survival Instincts and Barkskin reduce damage taken by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Perfectly-Honed Instincts
nodes.description: Well-Honed Instincts can trigger up to once every 90 sec.

nodes.name: Instincts of the Claw
nodes.description: Ferocious Bite and Maul damage increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Lycara's Teachings
nodes.description:
You gain 3% of a stat while in each form:

No Form: Haste
Cat Form: Critical Strike
Bear Form: Versatility
Moonkin Form: Mastery

nodes.name: Lore of the Grove
nodes.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: Gale Winds
choices.description: Increases Typhoon's radius by 20% and its range by 5 yds.

choices.name: Incessant Tempest
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Typhoon by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Gift of the Wild
nodes.description: Mark of the Wild is 100% more effective on yourself.

choices.name: Incapacitating Roar
choices.description: Shift into Bear Form and invoke the spirit of Ursol to let loose a deafening roar, incapacitating all enemies within 10 yards for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Mighty Bash
choices.description: Invokes the spirit of Ursoc to stun the target for 4 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

nodes.name: Ursine Vigor
nodes.description: For 4 sec after shifting into Bear Form, your health and armor are increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Improved Stampeding Roar
nodes.description: Cooldown reduced by 60 sec.

choices.name: Circle of the Wild
choices.description: Physical damage dealt by your abilities increased by 5%.

choices.name: Circle of the Heavens
choices.description: Magical damage dealt by your spells increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Lycara's Inspiration
nodes.description:
You gain a bonus while in each form inspired by the breadth of your Druidic knowledge:

No Form: 4% Magic Damage
Cat Form: 4% Stamina
Bear Form: 5% Movement Speed
Moonkin Form: 3% Area damage taken reduction

nodes.name: Symbiotic Relationship
nodes.description: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

nodes.name: Forestwalk
nodes.description: Casting Regrowth increases your movement speed and healing received by 8% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Fluid Form
nodes.description:
Shred, Rake, and Skull Bash can be used in any form and shift you into Cat Form, if necessary. 

Mangle can be used in any form and shifts you into Bear Form. 

Wrath and Starfire shift you into Moonkin Form, if known.

nodes.name: Heart of the Wild
nodes.description:
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 6,514 over 7 sec.

Bear Form:
Increase your maximum health by 30% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Innervate
nodes.description: Infuse a friendly healer with energy, allowing them to cast spells without spending mana for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Lifebloom
nodes.description:
Heals the target for 1,715 over 15 sec. When Lifebloom expires, is dispelled, or is refreshed near expiration the target is instantly healed for 833.

May be active on one target at a time.

nodes.name: Swiftmend
nodes.description: Consume a Regrowth, Wild Growth, or Rejuvenation effect to instantly heal an ally for 3,973.

nodes.name: Nature's Swiftness
nodes.description: Your next Regrowth, Rebirth, or Entangling Roots is instant, free, castable in all forms, and heals for an additional 60%.

nodes.name: Omen of Clarity
nodes.description: Your healing over time from Lifebloom has a 4% chance to cause a Clearcasting state, making your next Regrowth cost no mana.

choices.name: Verdant Infusion
choices.description: Swiftmend no longer consumes a heal over time effect, and extends the duration of your heal over time effects on the target by 8 sec.

choices.name: Prosperity
choices.description: Swiftmend now has 2 charges.

choices.name: Nature's Splendor
choices.description: The healing bonus to Regrowth from Nature's Swiftness is increased by 35%.

choices.name: Passing Seasons
choices.description: Nature's Swiftness's cooldown is reduced by 12 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Regrowth
nodes.description: Regrowth's initial heal has a 40% increased chance for a critical effect if the target is already affected by Regrowth.

nodes.name: Soul of the Forest
nodes.description: Swiftmend increases the healing of your next Regrowth or Rejuvenation by 60%.

nodes.name: Tranquil Mind
nodes.description: Increases Omen of Clarity's chance to activate Clearcasting to 5% and Clearcasting can stack 1 additional time.

nodes.name: Efflorescence
nodes.description: Grows a healing blossom at the target location, restoring 223 health to three injured allies within 10 yards every 1.8 sec for 30 sec. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Tranquility
nodes.description:
Heals all allies within 40 yards for 19,187 over 5.4 sec.

Healing decreased beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Ironbark
nodes.description: The target's skin becomes as tough as Ironwood, reducing damage taken by 20% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Verdancy
nodes.description: When Lifebloom blooms, up to 3 targets within your Efflorescence are healed for 360.

nodes.name: Lifetreading
nodes.description: Efflorescence healing increased by 25%, and it now automatically grows beneath your Lifebloom target's feet.

nodes.name: Grove Guardians
nodes.description: Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth summons a Treant that casts Nourish on that target or a nearby ally periodically, healing for 236. Lasts 8 sec.

choices.name: Inner Peace
choices.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by 30 sec.

While channeling Tranquility, you take 20% reduced damage and are immune to knockbacks.

choices.name: Flourish
choices.description: Tranquility extends the duration of all of your heal over time effects by 2 sec every 0.9 sec.

nodes.name: Cultivation
nodes.description: When Rejuvenation heals a target below 60% health, they are instantly healed for 115.

nodes.name: Improved Wild Growth
nodes.description: Wild Growth heals 2 additional targets.

choices.name: Stonebark
choices.description: Ironbark increases healing from your heal over time effects by 20%.

choices.name: Improved Ironbark
choices.description: Ironbark's cooldown is reduced by 20 sec.

nodes.name: Renewing Surge
nodes.description: Swiftmend cooldown is reduced by 15%, increasing up to 30% on lower health targets.

nodes.name: Rampant Growth
nodes.description: Regrowth's healing over time is increased by 100%, and it also applies to the target of your Lifebloom.

nodes.name: Regenesis
nodes.description: Rejuvenation healing is increased by up to 30%, and Tranquility healing is increased by up to 30%, healing for more on low-health targets.

nodes.name: Wild Synthesis
nodes.description: Grove Guardians, Efflorescence, and your other summons heal for 30% more.

nodes.name: Power of the Archdruid
nodes.description: Soul of the Forest now causes your next Rejuvenation or Regrowth to apply to 2 additional allies within 20 yards of the target.

nodes.name: Unstoppable Growth
nodes.description: Wild Growth's healing falls off 30% less over time.

nodes.name: Improved Swiftmend
nodes.description: Swiftmend healing increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Regenerative Heartwood
nodes.description: Allies protected by your Ironbark also receive 75% of the healing from each of your active Rejuvenations and Ironbark's duration is increased by 4 sec.

nodes.name: Ysera's Gift
nodes.description: Heals you for 3% of your maximum health every 5 sec. If you are at full health, an injured party or raid member will be healed instead.

choices.name: Incarnation: Tree of Life
choices.description:
Shapeshift into the Tree of Life, increasing healing done by 10%, increasing armor by 120%, and granting protection from Polymorph effects. Functionality of Rejuvenation, Wild Growth, Regrowth, Entangling Roots, and Wrath is enhanced.

Lasts 30 sec. You may shapeshift in and out of this form for its duration.

choices.name: Convoke the Spirits
choices.description:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec.

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

nodes.name: Call of the Elder Druid
nodes.description:
When you cast Starsurge, Rake, Shred, or Frenzied Regeneration you gain Call of the Elder Druid for 15 sec, once every 1 min.

 Call of the Elder Druid
Abilities not associated with your specialization are substantially empowered for 45 sec.

Balance: Cast time of Balance spells reduced by 30% and damage increased by 20%.

Feral: Gain 1 Combo Point every 2 sec while in Cat Form and Physical damage increased by 20%.

Guardian: Bear Form gives an additional 20% Stamina, multiple uses of Ironfur may overlap, and Frenzied Regeneration has 2 charges.

Restoration: Healing increased by 30%, and mana costs reduced by 50%.

nodes.name: Intensity
nodes.description: When Regrowth critically heals, it is 260% effective instead of the usual 200%.

choices.name: Liveliness
choices.description: Your damage over time effects deal their damage 25% faster, and your healing over time effects heal 5% faster.

choices.name: Master Shapeshifter
choices.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

Wrath, Starfire, and Starsurge deal 30% additional damage and generate 324 Mana.

Bear Form
Ironfur grants 30% additional armor and generates 375 Mana.

 Cat Form
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal 60% additional damage and generate 1,500 Mana when cast with 5 combo points.

nodes.name: Waking Dream
nodes.description: Ysera's Gift now heals every 4 sec and its healing is increased by 8% for each of your active Rejuvenations.

nodes.name: Embrace of the Dream
nodes.description: Wild Growth momentarily shifts your mind into the Emerald Dream, instantly healing all allies affected by your Rejuvenation or Regrowth for 820.

nodes.name: Cenarius' Guidance
nodes.description:
Incarnation: Tree of Life
During Incarnation: Tree of Life, you summon a Grove Guardian every 10 sec. The cooldown of Incarnation: Tree of Life is reduced by 5.0 sec when Grove Guardians fade.

 Convoke the Spirits
Convoke the Spirits' cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

nodes.name: Nature's Bounty
nodes.description: Regrowth heals all other allies with Regrowth for 20% of its healing.

nodes.name: Dream of Cenarius
nodes.description:
Wrath and Shred transfer 100% of their damage and Starfire and Swipe transfer 50% of their damage into healing onto a nearby ally. 

This effect is increased by 200% while Call of the Elder Druid is active.

nodes.name: Thriving Vegetation
nodes.description: Rejuvenation instantly heals your target for 15% of its total periodic effect and Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Abundance
nodes.description: For each Rejuvenation you have active, Regrowth's cost is reduced by 8% and critical effect chance is increased by 8%, up to a maximum of 96%.

nodes.name: Nurturing Dormancy
nodes.description: When your Rejuvenation heals a full health target, its duration is increased by 2 sec, up to a maximum total increase of 6 sec per cast.

nodes.name: Photosynthesis
nodes.description: Your periodic heals on targets with Lifebloom have a 8% chance to cause it to bloom.

nodes.name: Harmonious Blooming
nodes.description: Lifebloom counts for 3 stacks of Mastery: Harmony.

nodes.name: Reforestation
nodes.description: Every 4 casts of Swiftmend grants you Incarnation: Tree of Life for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Germination
nodes.description: You can apply Rejuvenation twice to the same target. Rejuvenation's duration is increased by 2 sec.

ranks.description: Lifebloom stacks every 5 sec, stacking up to 3 times.
20% of Lifebloom's final bloom heals up to 6 injured allies within 40 yds.
Lifebloom bursts into a Blooming Frenzy when you consume Soul of the Forest, causing it to bloom 3 times in rapid succession.

nodes.name: Wildstalker's Power
nodes.description:
Rip and Ferocious Bite damage increased by 5%.

Rejuvenation healing increased by 10%.

choices.name: Entangling Vortex
choices.description: Enemies pulled into Ursol's Vortex are rooted in place for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Flower Walk
choices.description: During Barkskin your movement speed is increased by 10% and every second flowers grow beneath your feet that heal up to 3 nearby injured allies for 76.

nodes.name: Strategic Infusion
nodes.description:
Attacking from Prowl increases the chance for Shred, Rake, and Swipe to critically strike by 8% for 6 sec.

Your periodic heals have a 4% increased chance to critically heal.

nodes.name: Lethal Preservation
nodes.description: When you remove an effect with Soothe or Remove Corruption, gain a combo point and heal for 4% of your maximum health. If you are at full health an injured party or raid member will be healed instead.

choices.name: Bond with Nature
choices.description: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Harmonious Constitution
choices.description: Your Regrowth's healing to yourself is increased by 35%.

nodes.name: Thriving Growth
nodes.description:
Rip and Rake damage has a chance to cause Bloodseeker Vines to grow on the victim, dealing 34 Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Wild Growth, Regrowth, and Efflorescence healing has a chance to cause Symbiotic Blooms to grow on the target, healing for 834 over 6 sec.

Multiple instances of these can overlap.

nodes.name: Vigorous Creepers
nodes.description:
Bloodseeker Vines increase the damage your abilities deal to affected enemies by 4%.

Symbiotic Blooms increase the healing your spells do to affected targets by 20%.

choices.name: Twin Sprouts
choices.description: When Bloodseeker Vines or Symbiotic Blooms grow, they have a 30% chance to cause another growth of the same type to immediately grow on a valid nearby target.

choices.name: Implant
choices.description: Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth causes a Symbiotic Bloom to grow on a target for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Hunt Beneath the Open Skies
nodes.description:
Damage and healing while in Cat Form increased by 3%.

Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Patient Custodian
nodes.description: Your heal over time effects are 6% more effective.

choices.name: Resilient Flourishing
choices.description:
Bloodseeker Vines and Symbiotic Blooms last 2 additional sec.

When a target afflicted by Bloodseeker Vines dies, the vines jump to a valid nearby target for their remaining duration.

choices.name: Root Network
choices.description:
Each active Bloodseeker Vine increases the damage your abilities deal by 2%.

Each active Symbiotic Bloom increases the healing of your spells by 2%.

nodes.name: Rampancy
nodes.description: Symbiotic Blooms have a 20% chance to trigger Bursting Growth every 2 sec at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Bursting Growth
nodes.description:
When Bloodseeker Vines expire or you use Ferocious Bite on their target they explode in thorns, dealing 30 physical damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

When Symbiotic Blooms expire or you cast Rejuvenation on their target flowers grow around their target, healing them and up to 3 nearby allies for 160.

nodes.name: Green Thumb
nodes.description: The rate at which Symbiotic Blooms grow is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Bounteous Bloom
choices.description: Your Grove Guardians' healing is increased by 30%.

choices.name: Early Spring
choices.description: Swiftmend and Wild Growth cooldowns reduced by 1 sec.

choices.name: Power of the Dream
choices.description: Dream Surge heals 1 additional ally.

choices.name: Control of the Dream
choices.description:
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to 15 seconds.

Affects Force of Nature, Celestial Alignment, and Convoke the Spirits.

nodes.name: Protective Growth
nodes.description: Your Regrowth protects you, reducing damage you take by 8% while your Regrowth is on you.

choices.name: Grove's Inspiration
choices.description:
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by 10%. 

Regrowth, Wild Growth, and Swiftmend healing increased by 9%.

choices.name: Potent Enchantments
choices.description:
Orbital Strike damage increased by 30%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by 30%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during Celestial Alignment by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Treants of the Moon
nodes.description: Your Grove Guardians cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

nodes.name: Dream Surge
nodes.description: When Grove Guardians are summoned, they grow Dream Petals on your target, healing up to 3 nearby allies for 558.

nodes.name: Blooming Infusion
nodes.description:
Every 5 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by 100%.

Every 5 Starsurges you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

nodes.name: Expansiveness
nodes.description: Your maximum mana is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Cenarius' Might
nodes.description: Swiftmend healing is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Power of Nature
choices.description: Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by 10% while active.

choices.name: Durability of Nature
choices.description: Your Force of Nature treants have 100% increased health.

nodes.name: Harmony of the Grove
nodes.description: Each of your Grove Guardians increases your healing done by 5% while active.

nodes.name: Spirit of the Thicket
nodes.description: Your Starfall damage is increased by 12% and your Starsurge damage is increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Dryad's Dance
nodes.description: Dryads cause most of your Astral power generation to be increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Sylvan Beckoning
nodes.description: Entering an Eclipse summons a Dryad to assist you for 8 sec, casting Starsurge dealing 569 Astral damage and Starfall at 200% effectiveness.
